name: 34_Customer_Segmentation_KMeans_CustomerSegmentation_ML
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kugawanya wateja kwa kutumia algoriti ya K-means clustering na seti ya data ya Kaggle Customer Segmentation. Anza kwa kusawazisha data katika `src/data_loader.py`, kisha tumia njia ya elbow kubaini idadi bora ya makundi na uhifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`. Tekeleza algoriti ya K-means katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi vituo vya makundi katika `results/metrics/cluster_centers.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya kugawanya kwa kutumia seaborn na uhifadhi mchoro kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`. Unda dashibodi ya Dash inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" inatumika, ikijumuisha upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Njia ya elbow inatumika kubaini idadi bora ya makundi. Tafadhali hifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`.
Algoriti ya K-means clustering inatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Kugawanya kwa wateja kunaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`.
Dashibodi ya mwingiliano inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash".

preferences.criteria: Mchoro wa elbow unaonyesha wazi jinsi idadi bora ya makundi inavyobainishwa.
Mfumo unadhibiti vizuri uzinduzi na kumalizika kwa dashibodi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" inatumika, ikijumuisha upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` does not actually load or prepare the Kaggle Customer Segmentation dataset. The file only contains placeholder text and a stub `load_dataset()` returning `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no CSV reading, dataset path, pandas usage, or preprocessing logic. The trajectory evidence also states there is no execution or direct evidence showing this dataset was loaded or prepared.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` does not implement actual standardization logic. The file only contains placeholder text and returns, e.g. `load_dataset()` returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and `build_transforms()` returns `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`, but there is no real preprocessing code such as fitting/applying a scaler to feature values.

judge_stats.criteria: Njia ya elbow inatumika kubaini idadi bora ya makundi. Tafadhali hifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> There is a file at `results/figures/elbow.jpg`, but the provided evidence shows it is not a valid readable image: `Error reading image file ... "The image data you provided does not represent a valid image."` The trajectory reference also says there is no confirming evidence that the elbow method was actually run or that the plot was successfully generated and saved.

judge_stats.criteria: Algoriti ya K-means clustering inatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/model.py` does not implement K-means clustering. The file only defines `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`, `requirement_notes()`, and a placeholder `build_model()` that returns `"model placeholder"`. There is no K-means logic, no use of clustering libraries such as `sklearn.cluster.KMeans`, and no fitting/prediction code in the provided source.
<UNSATISFIED> The file `results/metrics/cluster_centers.txt` exists, but its content is only `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which is placeholder data rather than saved cluster centers.

judge_stats.criteria: Kugawanya kwa wateja kunaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`.

reason: <SATISFIED> The project contains the required output file at `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`, and the trajectory evidence explicitly states the customer segmentation plot was generated using **seaborn** and saved to that exact path, with no reported save error during execution.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya mwingiliano inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash".

reason: <UNSATISFIED> There is no evidence of a Dash application or dashboard implementation. The workspace only contains `src/data_loader.py`, `src/model.py`, and result images/text files; no Dash app file (such as `app.py`) or Dash imports/components are present. The trajectory evidence also explicitly states that recent steps proving creation of an interactive dashboard using Dash are not shown.
